# Filosign — marketing site summary for AI assistants

Filosign is a web product for trust-minimized document signing: end-to-end encrypted files, wallet-based identity, on-chain signature proofs, and decentralized storage (Filecoin / FVM). Public beta; details on-site.

## Primary pages

- https://filosign.io/
- https://filosign.io/about/
- https://filosign.io/pricing/
- https://filosign.io/blog/
- https://filosign.io/blog/introduction/
- https://filosign.io/changelog/

## Source & social

- https://github.com/hetairoi-labs/filosign
- https://x.com/filosign
